overview: A modern AI-powered multilingual duplicate record detection system with a glassmorphism UI, dark/light mode, and a full detection flow from upload to results.
features: Landing page with hero, features showcase, and how-it-works flow
Drag-and-drop CSV/JSON upload or manual record entry
Animated processing loader with progress bar
Results cards with similarity scores, color coding, and matched word highlights
Dark/light mode toggle with localStorage persistence
Responsive design for mobile and desktop
Glassmorphism design with blue/purple AI theme
